item.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
item.description: Focus: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

item.title: [Exclusive] $250 off AI Engineer tix til Monday
item.description: Focus: special offer for subscribers - $250 off AI Engineer tix til Monday

item.title: Building the most AI-pilled engineering team in the world | Fiona Fung (Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork Teams)
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Building the most AI-pilled engineering team in the world | Fiona Fung (Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork Teams)', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.
